# cloudless_public_ip (Resource)

A public IP address allocated on a Fluence cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudless_public_ip" "edge" {
  cluster_id   = data.cloudless_cluster.main.id
  name         = "edge"
  address_type = "V4"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address_type` (String)
- `cluster_id` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `address` (String) The actual IP address allocated by the provider.
- `attached_to` (String) ID of the VM the public IP is attached to, if any.
- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)
- `user_id` (String)
